task.label: Require that verification of identity takes place

exception.description: Allow verification to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship
Allow the opening of an account

task.label: Verify identity of the customer and the beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

exception.description: Verification completed during the establishment of a business relationship

task.label: Allow verification of identity to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship

conditions.condition: if necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business
where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing
as soon as practicable after initial contact
in situations where verification is allowed during the establishment of a business relationship

task.label: Allow the opening of an account

conditions.condition: provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with customer due diligence requirements is obtained

task.label: Ensure transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf

conditions.condition: until full compliance with customer due diligence requirements is obtained
when the opening of an account is allowed before verification
until full compliance with customer due diligence requirements is obtained

task.label: Require that obliged entity complies with consequences of inability to apply customer due diligence

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: Apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with customer due diligence requirements

exception.description: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Apply the first subparagraph to notaries, other independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: only to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Require that obliged entities apply customer due diligence measures
Apply customer due diligence measures to all new customers
Apply customer due diligence measures to existing customers

conditions.condition: at appropriate times on a risk-sensitive basis
at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
